# hivemind skills

This directory contains custom non-Aspire skills for the dcs-hivemind repository.

## Included Skill(s)

- `hivemind`
  - Path: `.github/skills/hivemind/SKILL.md`
  - Purpose: interact with DCS gRPC proto catalogue and invoke methods via MCP tools.

## Usage

The .NET Aspire skill continues to live under `.github/skills/aspire`.

For this repo, `hivemind` skills are isolated for custom app-specific workflow tools.

## Notes

- Keep skill names unique across `.github/skills/*`.
- Add additional custom skills here as required.
